public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as hostler.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a hostler still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of hostler in and around House of Shelk Estate, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House of Shelk Estate workable through the obligations of hostler while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around House of Shelk Estate, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of hostler visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Ilyra Aurorine can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Ilyra Aurorine can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Ilyra Aurorine carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House of Shelk Estate: the part of House of Shelk Estate where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
